title: geranium seemannii subsp. seemannii
intro: Geranium seemannii subsp. seemannii, also known as the Jamaican geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to the Caribbean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Geranium seemannii subsp. seemannii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to address various health concerns, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
